input.complaint: I sent 5000 taka to a wrong number around 2pm today. The number was supposed to be 01712345678 but I think I typed it wrong. The person isn't responding to my call. Please help me get my money back.

output.agent_summary: Customer claims to have sent 5000 taka to a wrong number. Transaction history shows a transfer of 5000 taka to +8801719876543 at 2:08 PM today.
output.recommended_next_action: Verify the recipient's phone number and investigate the transaction
output.customer_reply: We're sorry to hear that you've sent money to a wrong number. We'll investigate this matter and any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. To proceed, could you please provide us with more information about the transaction, such as the recipient's phone number or the exact time of the transfer? Please note that we can only help you with the transaction that took place at 2:08 PM today, which was sent to +8801719876543. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

label: Wrong transfer claim with inconsistent evidence

input.complaint: I sent 2000 to the wrong person by mistake. Please reverse it.

output.agent_summary: The customer claims to have sent 2000 to the wrong person and requests a reversal. However, the transaction history shows multiple transfers to the same counterparty, making it unclear which transaction is the incorrect one.
output.recommended_next_action: Request more information from the customer to disambiguate the transaction
output.customer_reply: Sorry to hear that you're having trouble with a transfer. To assist you further, could you please provide the phone number of the intended recipient? Please note that any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

input.complaint: I tried to pay 1200 taka for my mobile recharge but the app showed failed. But my balance was deducted! Please refund my money.

output.agent_summary: Customer claims a payment failed but their balance was deducted. One failed payment transaction of 1200 taka is found in the transaction history.
output.recommended_next_action: Investigate the payment failure and consider refunding the customer if the balance was indeed deducted.
output.customer_reply: We apologize for the inconvenience. We have noted your issue and are investigating. Any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. We will get back to you soon. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

input.complaint: I paid 500 to a merchant for a product but I changed my mind and don't want it anymore. Please refund my 500 taka.

output.agent_summary: Customer changed their mind about a purchase and is requesting a refund of 500 taka.
output.recommended_next_action: Inform the customer that the refund will be processed if the merchant approves it.
output.customer_reply: Sorry to hear you've changed your mind about the purchase. We can't provide a refund without the merchant's approval. Any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

input.complaint: Someone called me saying they are from bKash and asked for my OTP. They said my account will be blocked if I don't share it. Is this real? I haven't shared anything yet.

output.agent_summary: Customer received a suspicious phone call asking for OTP, claiming to be from bKash.
output.recommended_next_action: Monitor the customer's account for any suspicious activity and guide them on how to report any further phishing attempts.
output.customer_reply: We appreciate your caution. We will never ask for it. If you have any concerns, please contact our official support channel. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

input.complaint: Something is wrong with my money. Please check.

output.agent_summary: Vague complaint about money issue, transaction history provided but no specific transaction mentioned.
output.recommended_next_action: Request more information from the customer to understand the issue.
output.customer_reply: Sorry to hear that you're experiencing an issue with your money. Could you please provide more details about the problem you're facing? Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

input.complaint: আমি আজ সকালে এজেন্টের কাছে ২০০০ টাকা ক্যাশ ইন করেছি কিন্তু আমার ব্যালেন্সে টাকা আসেনি। এজেন্ট বলছে টাকা পাঠিয়েছে কিন্তু আমি দেখছি না।

output.agent_summary: Customer claims cash in of 2000 BDT did not reflect in balance, despite agent confirming the transaction.
output.recommended_next_action: Review transaction status and investigate with the agent.
output.customer_reply: আপনার সমস্যা আমরা দেখছি। কৃপয়া আপনার এজেন্টের নাম এবং লেনদেনের সময় জানান। মনে রাখবেন আপনার PIN বা OTP কারো সাথে শেয়ার করবেন না।

input.complaint: I sent 1000 to my brother yesterday but he says he didn't get it. Please check.

output.agent_summary: Customer claims their brother did not receive a transfer of 1000, but the transaction history shows two completed transfers with the same amount, suggesting either the brother received one of these or the customer is mistaken about the recipient.
output.recommended_next_action: Gather more information from the customer to identify the intended recipient.
output.customer_reply: We are investigating the transfer issue you reported. To assist you better, could you please confirm your brother's phone number? Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

input.complaint: I am a merchant. My yesterday's sales of 15000 taka have not been settled to my account. Settlement usually happens by 11am next day. Please check.

output.agent_summary: Merchant's settlement of 15000 taka from yesterday's sales is pending, the merchant is requesting to check the settlement status.
output.recommended_next_action: Check the settlement status of the merchant's account and update the transaction status accordingly.
output.customer_reply: We have received your concern about the settlement delay. Our team will look into this matter and ensure any eligible amount is returned through official channels. We will get back to you soon. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

input.complaint: I paid my electricity bill 850 taka but it deducted twice from my account. Please check, I only paid once.

output.agent_summary: Customer claims to have made a single electricity bill payment of 850 taka but was charged twice.
output.recommended_next_action: Investigate duplicate payment and refund if eligible
output.customer_reply: We have received your complaint about the duplicate payment. Our team will investigate this matter. Any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.
